site.name: RaktaMitra
site.tagline: Government of Maharashtra Blood Donation Portal
site.govLine: Government of Maharashtra | Public Health Department

footer.aboutText: RaktaMitra is an official citizen service initiative by the Government of Maharashtra to connect blood donors, patients, hospitals and blood banks across the state.
footer.address: Public Health Department, Mantralaya, Mumbai, Maharashtra
footer.copyright: © 2026 Government of Maharashtra. All Rights Reserved.
footer.disclaimer: This is a citizen service portal. Content owned and maintained by the Public Health Department, Government of Maharashtra.

home.heroTitle: Every Drop Counts. Be Someone's Lifeline.
home.heroSubtitle: A trusted Government of Maharashtra platform connecting blood donors and patients across the state.
home.servicesSubtitle: Simple, fast and reliable services for every citizen of Maharashtra
home.service1Text: Register as a donor and save lives in your community.
home.service2Text: Find blood quickly for yourself or a loved one in need.
home.service3Text: Locate nearest blood banks with live availability.
home.service4Text: Find and join blood donation camps near you.
home.why3: Wide network of hospitals and blood banks
home.emergencySubtitle: Call our 24x7 emergency helpline for immediate assistance

donate.title: Donate Blood
donate.subtitle: Become a registered donor and help save lives across Maharashtra
donate.eligibility4: No major illness in the last 6 months
donate.eligibility5: Gap of at least 3 months since last donation
donate.benefit4: Priority assistance during your own emergencies

need.title: Need Blood
need.subtitle: Submit a blood request and we will connect you with nearby donors and blood banks
need.urgentNote: For life-threatening emergencies, please call our 24x7 helpline instead of waiting for an online response.

banks.title: Blood Banks
banks.subtitle: Find government and private blood banks across Maharashtra

hospitals.title: Hospitals
hospitals.subtitle: Partner hospitals associated with RaktaMitra across Maharashtra
hospitals.searchPlaceholder: Search hospitals by name or city

camps.title: Blood Donation Camps
camps.subtitle: Upcoming and ongoing blood donation camps near you

how.title: How It Works
how.subtitle: A simple 4-step process connecting donors and patients
how.step1Text: Create your free donor or requester account on RaktaMitra.
how.step2Text: Donors get listed in our network; patients search for matching donors.
how.step3Text: Our system connects you with verified donors, hospitals or blood banks.
how.step4Text: Complete the donation or receive blood safely through verified channels.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We are here to help you 24x7
contact.name: Full Name
contact.subject: Subject

login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Login to access your RaktaMitra account

register.title: Registration
register.subtitle: Create your free RaktaMitra account
register.terms: I agree to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy

locationPicker.title: Select Your Location
locationPicker.clickDistrict: Click on your district on the map, or search below
locationPicker.clickToSelect: Click to select location on map

roleSelector.title: Choose Your Role
roleSelector.subtitle: Select the role that best describes you to continue registration
roleSelector.donorDesc: Register as a blood donor to save lives
roleSelector.seekerDesc: Find blood donors for yourself or loved ones
roleSelector.hospitalDesc: Register your hospital to request blood

fields.mapInstruction: Search location or click directly on the map to pin your exact location
fields.mapRequired: Please pick a location on the map to continue

donorForm.title: Blood Donor Registration
donorForm.subtitle: Register to become a life-saving blood donor
donorForm.success: Registration successful! You can now log in.

seekerForm.title: Blood Seeker Registration
seekerForm.subtitle: Find blood donors for your family or friends in need
seekerForm.hospitalPlaceholder: Name of hospital where patient is admitted
seekerForm.success: Registration successful! You can now log in.

bankForm.title: Blood Bank Registration
bankForm.subtitle: Register your blood bank to manage listings and requests
bankForm.bankNamePlaceholder: Official name of the blood bank
bankForm.uploadHint: Click to upload or drag & drop
bankForm.success: Registration successful! You can now log in.

hospitalForm.title: Hospital Registration
hospitalForm.subtitle: Register your hospital to request and manage blood orders
hospitalForm.success: Registration successful! You can now log in.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.mobile: Please enter a valid 10-digit mobile number
validation.passwordLen: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.age: Age must be between 18 and 65 years
validation.weight: Weight must be at least 50 kg
validation.emergencyContactPhone: Please enter a valid 10-digit phone number
validation.units: Please enter a valid number of units
